---
title: "EasyDE Walkthrough — 01 Validate"
output: html_document
---

# Step 01: Validate Config & Contrasts

This step runs once per config file. It checks that all contrasts are
well-formed, files exist, and required columns are present.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
pipeline_root <- normalizePath("../..")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = pipeline_root)
setwd(pipeline_root)
config_path <- "config/config_treatments.yaml"   # EDIT THIS
```

## Source the script and run

```{r run-validation}
source("workflow/scripts/01_prepare_inputs.R")
main(config_path)
```

This creates a `.done` sentinel in your logs directory. If any contrasts have
issues, they are **flagged** but not fatal — the pipeline continues with
valid contrasts.
